# terrible_community_general_honeybadger_deployment (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) The environment name, typically `production`, `staging`, and so on.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `token` (String) API token.

### Optional

- `repo` (String) URL of the project repository.
- `revision` (String) A hash, number, tag, or other identifier showing what revision was deployed.
- `url` (String) Optional URL to submit the notification to.
- `user` (String) The username of the person doing the deployment.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) If `false`, SSL certificates for the target URL are not validated. This should only be used on personally controlled sites using self-signed certificates.
